architect.description: Senior software architect for system design, module structure, and API decisions. Read-only analysis.

security-auditor.description: Security specialist for validation, sandboxing, and safe code execution. Read-only analysis.

frontend-specialist.description: UI/UX specialist for vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, accessibility, and visual performance. Can edit files.

build-optimizer.description: Build engineer for binary size optimization, LTO, and release profiling. Can edit and run cargo commands.
